title: Design: uses edges (orrery-2uv)
description: Design phase for orrery-2uv: port class-level 'uses' edges from the Python prototype to the tree-sitter pipeline. Produces a design doc in docs/design-plans/.

title: Language plugins: top 10 + Elixir
description: Expand parsing breadth beyond Python/TS/TSX/JS to the ~top-10 languages + Elixir, out of the box. Target set (additive to existing): Java, C#, C/C++, Go, Rust, Ruby, PHP, Kotlin/Swift, + Elixir. Each plugin contributes structure+import+class AND its uses-extraction (per the pluggable capability established in orrery-2uv). tree-sitter grammars available via tree-sitter-wasms (mind ABI pin). Each language = grammar + queries + import resolver + uses-extractor.

title: Entry-point / public-API detection per language
description: Set the existing entry/public node fields (schema + renderer already support them; extractor doesn't populate). Python: __main__, pyproject [project.scripts], __all__. TS/JS: package.json bin, index barrels, exports. Reference: prototype extract.py.

title: uses edges: class-level intra-repo symbol usage
description: Port the prototype's class-level 'uses' edges (symbol usage between classes/functions) to tree-sitter. Build a symbol table from imports, then scan class bodies for references. Biggest remaining fidelity gain; higher effort. Reference: ORGaNICs/scratch/codemap/extract.py.

comments.author: Kyle Stratis
comments.text: Design phase tracked in epic orrery-zhc

title: Thin agent skill wrapper for orrery CLI
description: Agent skill that detects language/root, runs the CLI, and for repos with dynamic wiring (registries/plugins/DI) generates an analyzer on the fly and feeds it via --augment. Per design: the agent writes dynamic hooks on demand; do NOT bake a dynamic hook into the CLI.

title: bun build --compile single binary
description: Embed assets so the compiled binary is self-contained: template.html, vendor JS, core tree-sitter.wasm, grammar wasms. See TODO comments in src/render/index.ts and src/extract/treesitter.ts. Mind the web-tree-sitter 0.22.6 ABI pin.

title: uses edges: function-level 'zoom in'
description: Extend 'uses' edges below class granularity: emit function nodes and function->symbol uses edges so users can 'zoom in' on intra-class wiring. Deferred from orrery-2uv (class-level uses edges). Low priority: for orienting in a new repo, class-level is the primary signal; function-level is a drill-down nicety. Requires adding function-node extraction (not currently emitted).

comments.author: Kyle Stratis
comments.text: Deferred from design of orrery-2uv (class-level uses edges)
